opinion.h4: CHUPKA ET AL. v. LORENZ-SCHNEIDER CO., INC., ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK. No. 650. Decided February 18, 1963.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Samuel J. Cohen for appellee Teamsters Local 802.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
opinion.h4: KING COUNTY v. F. L. HARTUNG GLASS CO., INC., (1963)
opinion.p: KING COUNTY ET AL. v. F. L. HARTUNG GLASS CO., INC. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF WASHINGTON. No. 647. Decided February 18, 1963.
William L. Paul, Jr. for appellants.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
